review_criteria: Verify that V0.8 explicitly imports the V0.7 carry-overs (.agent-state/ physical migration, legacy tooling deprecation warnings, SubAgent review automation daemon) into its implementation scope.
Verify that V0.8 explicitly includes the new core requirements (Dynamic Participant Registry, Capability-Based Routing via a Dual-Tiered Sync Topology).

Verify that the kickoff materials (v0.8-planning-q-and-a.md, v0.8-scope-definition.md, v0.8-risk-register.md, v0.8-requirements-analysis.md, v0.8-milestone-map.md) explicitly answer the orchestration, registry, and workspace topology questions.
Verify that the kickoff materials do NOT permit the Executor (e.g., Hermes) to bypass the independent Gatekeeper SubAgent (e.g., opencode run).

Verify that the kickoff materials explicitly mandate a local .agent-state/ workspace for personal domain execution, falling back to a dedicated cloud sync branch (e.g., agent-sync) for remote team members.

Verify that NO physical implementation code (e.g., modifying src/mcp-server/src/index.ts) or active state model semantic changes (modifying workflow/dispatch.json) occurred during this kickoff planning phase.
